generated_oml:
instance DTEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Handles data pre-processing, actuation, and device communication; deployed as ROS2 package with nodes"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Manages data and control mechanisms; deployed as ROS2 package with nodes"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Includes 3D Visualization and Control Panel components; deployed as ROS2 package with nodes"
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "2D range scanning LiDAR for environmental perception and object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Stereo vision camera for real-time spatial data streams"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraStereoData
]

instance MotorSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for measuring motor speed and current to provide vehicle velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for measuring steering angle to provide vehicle steering data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed into motor voltage commands for vehicle propulsion"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls vehicle steering through precise servo-based mechanisms"
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraStereoData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance MotorSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted via Wi-Fi UDP"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance RawDepthCameraStereoData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw stereo vision data transmitted via Wi-Fi UDP"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraStereoData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance RawMotorSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw motor speed data transmitted via Wi-Fi UDP"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance RawSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw steering angle data transmitted via Wi-Fi UDP"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance ProcessedVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized and converted vehicle state data including speed and steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance ClusteredLiDARData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured LiDAR point cloud clusters after DBSCAN processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks derived from Kalman filtering of clustered LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ClusteredLiDARData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path data for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering raw LiDAR point clouds into structured tracks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking and state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 node for serializing, aligning message types, and unit conversions of sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 node for processing LiDAR point cloud data using DBSCAN clustering"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 node for object tracking using Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 node for real-time visualization and data saving of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 node for offloading ACC computations (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, command generation) from on-board ECU"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 node for remote control of ACC system and data collection for troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for persistent storage of object tracks and vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks; data saving and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, DataSavingAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "External processing of ACC system's lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, and command generation to alleviate on-board ECU constraints"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedCalculationInsight, CommandGenerationAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC system, set target speeds, and issue emergency braking commands; data collection for troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteACCControlAction, EmergencyBrakingAction, TroubleshootingInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks"
]

instance DataSavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Save sensor data to SQL database for persistent storage"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of lead vehicles based on sensor data for Adaptive Cruise Control"
]

instance SpeedCalculationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of desired speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance CommandGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate motor voltage commands and steering angles for ACC execution"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC system and setting target speeds"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issue emergency braking commands remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TroubleshootingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data collection and monitoring for system diagnostics and troubleshooting"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Controlling FE are serialized by the Data Translation component and transmitted over Wi-Fi UDP to the Actuation FE for execution on physical actuators. The Data Translation component handles serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions for command data streams."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for safety-critical vehicular applications due to hardware limitations, ensuring coordination between devices for computation offloading."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows the ISO 23247 Reference Architecture with modifications, deploying each functional entity (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User) on distinct hardware. Components are organized into ROS2 packages where each FE is implemented as a ROS2 node, facilitating system-wide coordination through ROS2 middleware."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The system enforces real-time and high-fidelity computational reflections, with validation requirements including implementation of Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) per ISO 15622. Key fidelity constraints include maximum network latency of 100 ms (Requirement R7) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms (Requirement R8) across all components."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Internal communication between software components uses ROS2, while inter-entity communication occurs over Wi-Fi using UDP in the transport layer. Requirement R7 specifies a maximum network latency of 100 ms. Bandwidth requirements and redundancy mechanisms are not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to ISO 23247:2021, which specifies a four-part framework: Part 1 (Overview and general principles), Part 2 (Reference architecture), Part 3 (Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements), and Part 4 (Information exchange). The reference architecture (Part 2) employs an entity-based model where the Observable Manufacturing Element (OME) represents physical entities (e.g., equipment, facilities, products), the Data Collection and Device Control Entity handles data acquisition and control of OMEs, the Digital Twin Entity provides a digital representation of OMEs, and the User Entity offers interfaces for interaction (e.g., monitoring data, control). Each entity comprises Functional Entities (FEs) for specific tasks like actuation, data transformation, and user interfacing. The standard does not dictate FEs' implementation, with OPC Unified Architecture cited as a possible protocol."
]
